backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining task management system with user profiles, task CRUD operations, verification/rating system, leaderboard, and integrated authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the back arrow button in ProfileView that navigates to hub, with high confidence and associated test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files including views, components, and hooks with details on authentication, task management, profile features, and UI enhancements.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Google Sign-In client script and mounting React app at #root div with title 'PROXIIS'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view state (landing/hub/profile) with neon grid background overlay and toast notifications via Sonner.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontal scrollable category filter with pill-style buttons, gradient selection state, and 'All' option for task filtering across 8 categories.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Modal dialog for performers to upload completion photos with progress tracking and for creators to verify tasks with star ratings (1-5).
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Horizontal scrollable filter bar with three toggle buttons (Newest, Most Urgent, Highest Paying) using pill-style design and blue accent colors.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Top navigation bar component with centered PROXIIS branding, search functionality, notifications popover, leaderboard sheet, and profile navigation.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays top 10 users ranked by earnings, showing task completion count and average rating with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating new tasks with fields for title, category, price, location, safe spot, telegram handle, deadline, and photo upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Renders a star rating display with support for full, half, and empty stars based on a numeric rating value.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying task preview with photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price; opens TaskDetailsSheet on click with profile validation.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting tasks, discussing via Telegram, completing tasks, toggling chat, and deleting posts based on user role.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Auto-scrolling vertical reel displaying recent completed tasks with seamless looping animation.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Configuration file exporting UPI_ID constant for payment processing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Custom React hook for Google OAuth authentication that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, handles sign-in/sign-out, decodes JWT tokens, and manages user state with error handling and timeout logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing AuthClient initialization, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard data (array of Profile objects) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, including caller profile retrieval, Google-based profile creation, and profile updates with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: React Query mutation hooks for task lifecycle actions including assigning performers, completing tasks with photos, verifying tasks with ratings, toggling Telegram discussions, and deleting tasks with automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: React Query hooks for task data operations including fetching all tasks, searching tasks by query, retrieving user post history, and creating new tasks with photos and deadlines.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for dark mode theming, defining colors for UI elements (primary, secondary, accent, borders, etc.) and forcing dark mode color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions to generate deep links for Telegram handles and UPI payment links with 10% platform fee calculation.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Time conversion utilities for converting between datetime-local input strings and bigint nanosecond timestamps, plus formatting deadlines for display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both standard query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main hub view component displaying task cards with filtering, sorting, search, and category selection; includes authentication checks and post task modal.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Landing page component with hero section, feature highlights, and call-to-action button that navigates to the hub view.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: Profile view component managing user authentication, profile setup with Google sign-in, displaying user stats, ratings, and post history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors using OKLCH color space, border radius variables, shadows, animations, and typography settings.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking feature requests, including a pending request to add back arrow navigation from profile page to hub page.
